ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (District/Charter) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal of the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metric record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "avg_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students */,
  "avg_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students */,
  "percent_passing_math" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "percent_passing_reading" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metrics were recorded */,
  "avg_science_score" REAL /* Average science score */,
  "avg_social_studies_score" REAL /* Average social studies score */,
  "percent_passing_science" REAL /* Percentage of students passing science */,
  "percent_passing_social_studies" REAL /* Percentage of students passing social studies */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the budget record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the budget is allocated for */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget for the year */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget per student for the year */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., State, Federal, Local) */,
  "spending_categories" TEXT /* JSON field to store spending categories and amounts */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the budget */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Information about any special needs the student may have */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the teacher works for */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "subject_specialization" TEXT /* Subject the teacher specializes in */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* JSON field to store any additional certifications */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the classroom belongs to */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the classroom */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher assigned to the classroom */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level the classroom is for */,
  "furniture_type" TEXT /* Type of furniture in the classroom */,
  "technology_equipment" TEXT /* JSON field to store technology equipment in the classroom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classrooms_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classrooms_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurriculars" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular activity */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school offering the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the activity is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor leading the activity */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurriculars_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurriculars_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the staff member works at */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Principal, Administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started working */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member left (if applicable) */,
  "emergency_contact_info" TEXT /* JSON field to store emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who marked the attendance */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classroom */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes about the attendance (e.g., tardiness, early dismissal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "math_score" REAL /* Score in math */,
  "reading_score" REAL /* Score in reading */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level during the test */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who administered the test */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classroom */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., State, District) */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the parent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the parent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the parent */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the student (e.g., Mother, Father, Guardian) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, budget) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "data" TEXT /* Serialized data of the report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the report is about */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the report covers (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file if the report is stored as a file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
